repo.description: The most widely used Python to C compiler
repo.name: cython

body:
See https://groups.google.com/g/cython-users/c/Z-qVaNk8wRI.

get_frame could return early and thus forget to close the critical section.

Also, change to using our internal macros rather than guarding them.

commit.message:
Fix __Pyx__Coroutine_get_frame critical section

See https://groups.google.com/g/cython-users/c/Z-qVaNk8wRI.

get_frame could return early and thus forget to close the
critical section.

Also, change to using our internal macros rather than
guarding them.
